overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, holographic billboards, and pedestrians with glowing umbrellas. The footage is from a video game engine, showcasing a futuristic urban environment with reflective wet surfaces and dense atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with digital kiosk and wet crosswalk

events.description: stepping from sidewalk onto the yellow-striped crosswalk
slight right turn while crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across a rain-slicked street intersection at night, approaching a large illuminated billboard in the distance

notable_agents.action: person in yellow shirt running across the wet street

entered.detail: tall teal digital advertising kiosk displaying Doc Ryder poster with purple and white graphics
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes reflecting neon lights
tall concrete pole with medical cross symbol and directional signs
cluster of high-rise buildings covered in illuminated advertisements and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street corner at night. The camera moves from the sidewalk onto a wide yellow crosswalk, passing a digital kiosk while heading toward a distant cluster of neon-lit skyscrapers. A pedestrian in yellow runs past on the right as light rain creates reflective pools on the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy pedestrian plaza with large holographic advertisements

events.description: pedestrians with glowing neon umbrellas appear in the crosswalk ahead
turning left to follow the crosswalk path toward the large billboard

agents.ego_description: walking through a crowded crosswalk toward a massive pink holographic billboard, weaving between pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person with glowing green umbrella walking directly ahead
group of three pedestrians crossing in the same direction with dark umbrellas

entered.detail: massive holographic display showing woman with pink hair and FEET THE DEM text in bright neon
vertical red neon sign with samurai character and Japanese text
trees with distinctive red foliage lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a bustling plaza dominated by a massive pink holographic billboard. The camera moves through a moderate crowd of pedestrians, some carrying glowing umbrellas that cast colored light on the wet pavement. The environment is dense with neon signage including a prominent vertical samurai sign on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with storefronts and vertical light installations

events.description: moving from open crosswalk onto tiled sidewalk with building overhangs
entering darker area with overhead cover reducing direct rain exposure

agents.ego_description: walking along a wet tiled sidewalk past various storefronts and digital advertisements, following the flow of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person with black umbrella and backpack walking alongside the camera

entered.detail: commercial entrance with glowing red interior lighting and digital menu displays
tall vertical strips of purple and pink neon lighting
multiple large LED screens showing various product advertisements

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk lined with vertical neon pillars and glowing storefronts. The pavement transitions from asphalt to tiles as the camera moves under building overhangs. The area features dense digital advertising and moderate pedestrian traffic with umbrellas, while the large pink billboard recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with overhead linear lighting

events.description: entering fully covered walkway with concrete roof structure overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered urban walkway with overhead fluorescent lighting, following a small group of pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians with umbrellas walking ahead in the covered passage

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure with linear fluorescent lighting fixtures providing shelter from rain
large horizontal advertisement displaying Set Sail text with beverage imagery
safety barrier with yellow and black stripes along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a covered pedestrian underpass that provides shelter from the rain. The environment shifts from open neon-lit streets to an enclosed corridor with overhead linear lighting and metal railings. The camera follows a small group of pedestrians toward a distant Set Sail billboard at the end of the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked open street into the sheltered confines of a futuristic pedestrian underpass. It begins on a wet street corner, moving across a yellow crosswalk past a digital kiosk toward a distant cluster of neon skyscrapers as a pedestrian in yellow dashes by. As the camera enters a bustling plaza, the environment opens up under a massive pink holographic billboard and a vertical samurai sign, with glowing umbrellas casting colored light across the reflective pavement. The scene then shifts toward a commercial sidewalk where the asphalt transitions to tiles under building overhangs lined with neon pillars and dense digital advertising. Finally, the camera moves away from the open rain and into an enclosed corridor with overhead linear lighting and metal railings, following a group of pedestrians toward a distant Set Sail billboard.
